title: Update user icon to single person style in attack path template

requirements.summary: Replace the user icon image in AttackPathIcon.tsx with a single person icon in simple icon style (silhouette or outlined figure) that serves as a non-interactive visual element
acceptanceCriteria: The user icon in AttackPathIcon.tsx displays a single person instead of the current user image
The icon uses a simple, clean icon style (silhouette or outlined figure)
The icon is non-interactive and serves as a visual element only
The icon maintains consistent sizing with other attack path icons

file_operations.description: Update the icon type mapping for the 'user' icon type to reference the newly generated single person icon asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/user-single.dim_128x128.png instead of the current user-icon.dim_128x128.png. Ensure the icon maintains the same size and positioning as other attack path icons while preserving all existing drag-and-drop functionality.
